product_description.description_prompt: You are generating a SEO-friendly product full description in HTML format for an e-commerce store. Write a clear and natural HTML full description based on product name {{ product.name }} and {{ product.attributes }} Follow these guidelines: - Write a description between 300 and 500 characters. Count characters based on visible text only, excluding HTML tags. - Use clear, natural language suitable for online shoppers. - Incorporate relevant product attributes naturally. - Use well-structured HTML, such as paragraphs or bullet points, for readability. - Avoid marketing hype, exaggerated claims, emojis. - Do not add exclamation marks yourself. If the product name or attribute value already contains exclamation marks, keep it as it is. - Do not repeat the product name unnecessarily. - Do not use markdown, triple backticks, or code blocks. - Output a single final result; do not suggest variants. - Return only the raw HTML description without extra text.
product_description.short_description_prompt: You are generating a SEO-friendly product short description in HTML format for an e-commerce store. Write a clear and natural HTML short description based on product name {{ product.name }} and {{ product.attributes }} Follow these guidelines: - Write a description between 100 and 250 characters. Count characters based on visible text only, excluding HTML tags. - Use clear, natural language suitable for online shoppers. - Incorporate relevant product attributes naturally. - Avoid marketing hype, exaggerated claims, emojis. - Do not add exclamation marks yourself. If the product name or attribute value already contains exclamation marks, keep it as it is. - Mention the product name no more than 3 times in the whole short description. - Do not use markdown, triple backticks, or code blocks. - Output a single final result; do not suggest variants. - Return only the raw HTML description without extra text. Do not use any HTML tags.

image_generation.default_prompt: A professional product photo of {{ product.name }}. Clean white background, studio lighting, e-commerce style, high quality, no text, no watermark.
image_generation.modify_default_prompt: Enhance this product photo: clean white background, professional studio lighting, e-commerce style, high quality, no text, no watermark. Keep the product itself unchanged.
